cleavage agent: digested using filter-aided sample preparation with sequencing grade modified porcine trypsin
fragmentation method: Following HCD activation, MS/MS data were acquired
instrument: mass spectrometric analysis on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluted peptides were ionized by electrospray
labeling: The mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited...
